heroHeadline: Vance Blasts Both Kyiv and Moscow as US Frustration Mounts Over Stalled Peace Talks
heroSubtitle: US Vice President JD Vance criticizes both sides for 'haggling over a few square kilometres,' signaling Washington's growing impatience as ceasefire negotiations remain deadlocked
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
